reflections.self_assessment: I navigated the game well as the Assassin, taking calculated risks to ensure my role remained hidden while causing the most harm to the opposing team. I was successful in manipulating missions to our team's advantage, and my kills went unnoticed until the end of the game. However, I could have been more proactive earlier in the game to eliminate potential threats.

player_observations.Bob: Played a solid game as the Evil character, effectively working alongside others to sabotage the good team. His ability to blend in without being suspected made him a challenge to detect.
player_observations.Charlie: Charlie's performance as Merlin was impressive, as he skillfully guided the good team's decisions and often made key plays to block our missions. His ability to remain undetected and make impactful decisions made him a valuable asset to their team.
player_observations.Diana: As the Good character, Diana was overly cautious and failed to adapt to the shifting dynamics of the game. She relied heavily on Merlin's guidance, which made their team predictable and easier to manipulate.
player_observations.Eve: Eve's performance as the Good character was lackluster, as she consistently fell into traps and failed to make informed decisions. Her lack of awareness of her surroundings made it easy for me to target her, further weakening the good team.

reflections.self_assessment: Unable to reflect on this game.
Unable to reflect on this game.

I was able to identify and eliminate the assassin, Alice, in the third mission, which is a significant accomplishment. However, I had difficulty trusting and communicating effectively with other players, leading to the failure of missions 1 and 2. I could improve by being more proactive in questioning and deducing roles of other players early on.

player_observations.Bob: Bob was consistently cautious and strategic, but ultimately his cautious nature made him less likely to contribute decisively in missions. He might benefit from taking calculated risks to advance the team's goals.
player_observations.Alice: Alice did an excellent job of staying under the radar and deceiving other players about her role, but her lack of action made her suspicious. A more active and aggressive approach might have been more effective in maintaining her cover.
player_observations.Charlie: Charlie played a crucial role as the merlin by guiding the team and eliminating the evil role, Bob. His calm and objective decision-making skills were evident throughout the game. He would be an invaluable asset to the team with his strategic thinking.
player_observations.Eve: Eve was an incredibly supportive team player and took the initiative to contribute to each mission. She worked well in tandem with the other players and had a clear understanding of her role. Her proactive approach helped to keep missions on track.

reflections.self_assessment: Unable to reflect on this game.
